name: CMP_MKT_VND_CAREER_STREAM_VL
query: SELECT B.CAREER_STREAM_ID, B.CAREER_STREAM_SEQ_NUM, B.CAREER_STREAM_CODE, T.CAREER_STREAM_NAME, T.CAREER_STREAM_DESCR, T.DESCRIPTION, B.VENDOR_ID, B.STATUS, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM CMP_MKT_VND_CAREER_STREAM_B B, CMP_MKT_VND_CAREER_STREAM_TL T WHERE B.CAREER_STREAM_ID = T.CAREER_STREAM_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
